productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Check Multi Shirt
description: CompositionMulti coloured checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a full front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest with branding and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash delicate at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, bleach, scrub, tumble dry or wringDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsFor those who love their casual wardrobe to be perfectly stylish and endlessly comfortable, this fabulous checked shirt from united colors of benetton is a must-have. The stylish cut of the shirt gives it a cool vibe, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this shirt with jeans and suede boots.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
